description: This is a bank check, used to pay money to people or business

check_number.instruction: This is the check number in the checkbook. It is typically the last of the block of MICR numbers

bank_routing_number.instruction: The routing number is typically the first of the MICR numbers.

date.instruction: The date the check has been signed. Reformat to YYYY-MM-DD

amount_in_words.instruction: The amount in words, as written.

dollar_amount.instruction: The dollar amount in numbers, as written

payee_name.instruction: To whom the check is addressed

account_holder_name.instruction: The account holder's name and display on the first and last name.

memo.instruction: The memo that describe what the check was for

routing_number_valid.instruction: True if the bank routing number has 9 digits
